The meeting, which was attended by nearly 50 participants, ended with the thanks of Prof. Manav, General Coordinator of the Project, to all participants.Our Department of Industrial Design Signed Erasmus Agreement with Design Academy Eindhoven

Kadir Has University Department of Industrial Design signed an Erasmus agreement with Design Academy Eindhoven (DAE), one of the world’s leading educational institutions in the field of design.

With many bilateral agreements with design academies and universities from all over the world and a long tradition of student exchange, Design Academy Eindhoven stands out with its hybrid, conceptual, contextual and international approach to design.

The academic staff and students of Kadir Has University Department of Industrial Design, which is the first department in Turkey to collaborate with DAE, which has more than 700 students from more than 40 countries, will have the opportunity to work with a team of professional designers, researchers, writers and curators, all of whom are active in academia and the professional field by applying to this exchange program.
